We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Employment Type: Full-time

	Applicant must live in Kuje, Abuja or Kuje Axis

Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 per month.

Head of Sales Job at Golden Spoon Food Limited




        
    

        
        Golden Spoon Food Limited is a Nigerian food production and distribution company headquartered in the Kuje area of the Federal Capital Territory (FCT). They operate a nationwide distribution network for their food products. The company frequently expands its workforce in the Abuja region, hiring for full-time roles.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Sales

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
     

            
    




	Applicants must possess at least a B.Sc. Business administration, Economics and other related fields
	Applicant must live in Kuje, Abuja or Kuje Axis
	Applicants must possess strong background in Marketing, Sales or Customer services
	2–4 years of experience as a Head of Sales or Leadership roles
	Applicants must be able to have good management skills
	Applicants must possess good analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Applicants must have good communication and teamwork skills.
	Applicants must be detail-oriented, trustworthy, and able to work with minimal supervision.


Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application and CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries, call/text 08165982379.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Controller

Job Location: Onshore, Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

	To ensure the smooth running of the purchasing and logistics functions of the Operation and provide support to the Rig Manager
	Ensure the shore-based contacts list is kept up-to-date and is distributed to all parties

	Assist the Rig Manager in the timely preparation of the shore-based budget, if requested

	15 years of relevant experience
	Ability to work proactively and independently.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Logistics Controller Job at Blue Phoenix Deepwater Limited




        
    

        
        Blue Phoenix Deepwater Limited is a 100% Nigerian-owned company with offices in the United Kingdom and Nigeria. The company was established to be an international player with regional strength as a provider of underwater and topside IRM (Inspection, Repair, and Maintenance) of FPSOs, Rigs, SPMs, and offshore and onshore terminals /platforms, primarily in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Controller

Job Location: Onshore, Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Duties and Responsibilities
     

            
    




	To ensure the smooth running of the purchasing and logistics functions of the Operation and provide support to the Rig Manager
	Ensure the shore-based contacts list is kept up-to-date and is distributed to all parties
	Liaise with the Human Resources Department on all crew schedules, and movements to and from the home country to the area of operation
	Assist the Human Resources Department with personnel immigration and logistics in country
	Attend all rig medevac's/casevacs and ensure that the HR Manager & HR Supervisor is informed in a timely manner, where applicable, and that approval is received for medical treatment/hospitalization repatriation, where necessary
	Assistant Aberdeen Procurement Officer to purchase/rent requisitioned items/services in compliance with Stena's Procurement Procedures
	Assist the Rig Manager in the timely preparation of the shore-based budget, if requested


Required skills and experience:


	15 years of relevant experience
	Ability to work proactively and independently.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications / CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply
